message:
feat(fcp-manifest): add rate limit pool declarations section

Expand ConnectorManifest with rate limit configuration:

RateLimitsSection:
- pools: Named rate limit pool definitions
- operation_pools: Map operations to pool IDs they consume

RateLimitPoolSection:
- id, scope (connector/zone/global), unit (requests/tokens/bytes)
- window_secs, max_value, burst configuration
- enforcement (hard/soft), cooldown settings

to_declarations() converter:
- Transform manifest TOML config to fcp_core::RateLimitDeclarations
- Validates pool configurations via fcp_core validation

Error handling:
- RateLimitDeclaration error variant for validation failures
- Integrated into manifest validation pipeline

This enables connectors to declare rate limit pools that can be
shared across multiple operations, supporting both RPM and token
limits with configurable enforcement policies.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
